description: Vital Recorder is open on the Windows desktop. You are a clinical researcher studying perioperative time management and surgical workflow efficiency. Analyze the temporal structure of the longest case among the recordings in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\VitalRecorderData\ (0001.vital, 0002.vital, and 0003.vital). Identify the perioperative phases—pre-operative (case start to surgery start), intraoperative (surgery start to surgery end), and post-operative (surgery end to case end)—using the event markers. Export the intraoperative segment (from 'Surgery started' to 'Surgery finished') to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\longest_case_intraop.csv. Produce a phase analysis report at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\phase_analysis.txt documenting the case identifier, total recording duration, the duration of each phase in minutes, the percentage of total time each phase represents, and the physiological tracks available in that case. Login: Windows Desktop user.
